labels.label: runtime_reproducible
labels.definition: runtime reproducible classification under bounded isolated reproduction checks
labels.requiredEvidence: metadata retrieval, install/provision attempt, runtime or explicit failure, static/runtime comparison
labels.falsifier: class-specific runtime, dependency, artifact, or replay check contradicts the assigned label
labels.downgradeRule: downgrade to inconclusive or narrower mechanism if static/runtime/replay evidence conflicts
